scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/protocol && npm run build --workspace=apps/relay && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/relay && cargo test -p emberchamber-core -p emberchamber-relay-protocol
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/web && npm run lint --workspace=apps/relay
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=packages/protocol && npm run type-check --workspace=apps/relay && npm run type-check --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && cargo check -p emberchamber-core -p emberchamber-relay-protocol
